title: Link-Bearing Elements, Relations, Base URLs, and Crawl Graph · Runtime Contract: Rel Policy
summary: Only anchor tags are inspected, every href becomes a page, relation and base semantics disappear, and fetched URL sets stand in for a graph. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go rel policy increment in semantic provenance-rich link graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Interpret rel tokens, canonical, alternate, hreflang, download, media, nofollow, and target under explicit owner policy.
Use first valid base semantics against final response URL and retain accepted and rejected base evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-go-rel-policy-9pdmhz(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_crawler_go_rel_policy_9pdmhz\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?linkCases < 18)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?classifiedLinks < 17 \|\| classifiedLinks > linkCases)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?relationCases < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?unexplainedEdges > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using interpret and tokens plus specific case evidence.
